title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Type-System Trace: Proxy Hop By Hop Fields
summary: The origin and proxy disagree about framing, forwarded fields are appended without trust, hop-by-hop fields cross boundaries, and parser tolerance is enabled to fix malformed clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts proxy hop by hop fields increment in proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.
Model automation-sensitive business operations with actor, cost, inventory, velocity, sequence, idempotency, anomaly, friction, appeal, and recovery evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
